function.name: _website_create_module
function.description: Create website resource and component designer module. Used to host website resources and page structure. AI should query existing website modules before creating a module to avoid duplication or naming conflicts.

id.description: Website resource and component designer module ID (use camelCase naming, unique within the system, must not duplicate existing modules).

name.description: Name of the website resource and component designer module.

parentId.description: Module group ID, the tool _query_app_define_designer can get the module group definition list
